twitter.copy: Black Friday Sale! Get 25% off our effective & affordable skincare solutions at Beminimalist! #Beminimalist #BlackFriday #SkincareLovers

instagram.copy: It's time to glow! We're having a Black Friday sale with 25% off all our skincare products!
